claims.claimText: Multiligament Knee Injury pathoanatomy centers on acl, pcl, mcl and related stabilizers.

metadata.claim_text: Multiligament Knee Injury pathoanatomy centers on acl, pcl, mcl and related stabilizers.

claims.claimText: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating multiligament knee injury.

metadata.claim_text: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating multiligament knee injury.

claims.claimText: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for multiligament knee injury.

metadata.claim_text: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for multiligament knee injury.

claims.claimText: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for multiligament knee injury — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

metadata.claim_text: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for multiligament knee injury — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

claims.claimText: Multiligament knee injuries demand vascular exam, reduction, and staged reconstruction planning.

metadata.claim_text: Multiligament knee injuries demand vascular exam, reduction, and staged reconstruction planning.

claims.claimText: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for multiligament knee injury require attending-defined progression gates.

metadata.claim_text: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for multiligament knee injury require attending-defined progression gates.

claims.claimText: Knee dislocation and multiligament injury require documented distal perfusion and ABI when indicated.

metadata.claim_text: Knee dislocation and multiligament injury require documented distal perfusion and ABI when indicated.

decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from multiligament knee injury despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after multiligament knee injury treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones

decisionPoints.trigger: Multiligament knee injury with absent or diminished distal pulses
decisionPoints.action: Emergent vascular evaluation and revascularization before definitive ligament reconstruction
